title: Buffalo Rally soon
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The Nomads Motorcycle Club...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Nomads Motorcycle Club of Cape Town is thrilled to host the Buffalo Rally again this year at the ATKV Hartenbos resort.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The Nomads Motorcycle Club of Cape Town is thrilled to host the Buffalo Rally again this year at the ATKV Hartenbos resort."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It will take place from 11 to 13 April and it will be the 17th time the rally takes place in Mossel Bay.","html":"It will take place from 11 to 13 April and it will be the 17th time the rally takes place in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Chairman of the Nomads Motorcycle Club, Luderick Jacoby, said: \"With thousands of riders coming together for this exciting event, we ask for the community's patience and understanding over the weekend as we do our best to minimise disruptions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the ongoing concerns has been the revving of motorcycles late at night.","html":"One of the ongoing concerns has been the revving of motorcycles late at night."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"While we actively work to prevent this, it remains a challenge, given the size of the event. We appreciate the support of the residents and hope everyone enjoys the weekend just as much as the motorcyclists do,\" said Jacoby.","html":"\"While we actively work to prevent this, it remains a challenge, given the size of the event. We appreciate the support of the residents and hope everyone enjoys the weekend just as much as the motorcyclists do,\" said Jacoby."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Members of the public can experience the event on Saturday, 12 April, by paying a day entry fee of R250 per person (no Under 18s allowed). Tickets will be on sale, only on Saturday, from 08:00, at the Late Entry Container Office in Paardekraal Avenue, Hartenbos.","html":"Members of the public can experience the event on Saturday, 12 April, by paying a day entry fee of R250 per person (no Under 18s allowed). Tickets will be on sale, only on Saturday, from 08:00, at the Late Entry Container Office in Paardekraal Avenue, Hartenbos."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A key highlight is the motorcycle procession on Saturday, starting at 11:00 from George Road, near the De Bakke Santos seaside resort entrance.","html":"A key highlight is the motorcycle procession on Saturday, starting at 11:00 from George Road, near the De Bakke Santos seaside resort entrance."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The route will take riders through The Point, along the R102, Louis Fourie Road, the N2 and back to ATKV Hartenbos via exit 397, the Oudtshoorn/Hartenbos offramp."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We look forward to an amazing weekend, filled with camaraderie, adventure and a shared passion for motorcycles,\" said Jacoby.","html":"\"We look forward to an amazing weekend, filled with camaraderie, adventure and a shared passion for motorcycles,\" said Jacoby."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
